_readme: PLACEHOLDER DATA. Source labels/categories/ilvls below are made up to exercise the Droptimizer engine end-to-end; they are not this season's real loot tables. Item ids are deliberately reused from tests/fixtures/sample_export.simc (a real, currently-valid gear set) rather than invented, so this catalog is actually simulatable out of the box -- simc segfaults on some malformed/nonexistent item ids instead of failing cleanly, which would take down the whole combined run. Replace the 'items' list with real current-tier data (raid bosses per difficulty, M+ dungeons per key-level bracket + vault, world bosses, delves) before trusting sim results; keep reusing real item ids if you add more placeholders. The engine (app/droptimizer.py) doesn't need to change when you do — see CLAUDE.md. NOTE: no weapon-slot (main_hand/off_hand) entry is included here -- verified against the simc nightly this app currently pulls, an 'id=...,ilevel=...' profileset override on a weapon segfaults simc even when reusing the exact item/bonus_id the baseline profile already equips successfully (a simc-side issue with weapon item overrides in profilesets, not an app bug). Test any weapon-slot catalog entries you add against your own simc build before trusting them in a combined run.
